title: Witness patrol formula and escalation routing missing
description: During wallball/witness patrol on 2026-05-05, gt patrol new failed because proto mol-witness-patrol is not found in the formula catalog. gt formula list reports no formulas in the configured search paths. gt escalate and gt mail send mayor/ also fail because /Users/brsmyth/co/.beads lacks issue_prefix config. Witness continued manual patrol from gt prime output.
notes: Patrol evidence: gt status/vitals report Dolt production :3307 stopped and zero registered databases, with test zombie PIDs 40342 and 40392. gt mail/escalate/handoff route to /Users/brsmyth/co/.beads and fail due missing issue_prefix. gt patrol report fails because no active patrol exists. hq-mayor was nudged via gt nudge; gt handoff --auto also could not persist mail.

title: Refinery patrol infrastructure missing formula and agent bead
description: gt patrol new fails with: proto mol-refinery-patrol not found in catalog. gt formula list and bd formula list report no formulas in /Users/brsmyth/co/wallball/.beads/formulas, /Users/brsmyth/.beads/formulas, or /Users/brsmyth/co/.beads/formulas. gt agents list shows wallball refinery, but bd list --label=gt:agent returns no active agent beads, so the runbook-required gt mol step await-event --agent-bead flow cannot start. Patrol was run manually on 2026-05-05: inbox empty, gt mq list wallball empty, no open merge-request beads. gt escalate also failed because it attempted to create an escalation bead under /Users/brsmyth/co/.beads, which is not initialized.
notes: 2026-05-05T19:46Z refinery patrol update: gt prime --hook successfully created patrol hq-wisp-5pl; manual cycle found inbox empty, gt mq list wallball empty, and no open merge-request beads. gt patrol report closed hq-wisp-5pl and started hq-wisp-acg. Agent bead lookup still returns zero (bd list --label=gt:agent --json => []), so runbook-required await-event --agent-bead flow remains blocked.

title: Add automated tests for rules, scoring, inning transitions, ball-result calculations, rebound calculations, high score updates, predefined roster loading, and match summary generation
Stretch: add remote two-player room creation, join flow, synchronized player intents, and match recording across two phones
Add the first friend interaction hooks for player matchup and match-history callouts
Prototype fielding movement and ball recovery
Wire outs, scoring, half-inning transitions, match recording, and leaderboard updates
Prototype batting timing and ball launch
Prototype wall target collision and rebound behavior
Add desktop keyboard controls and phone touch-control abstractions for swing, pitch, and fielding actions
Add the behind-pitcher wall-facing camera framing with the pitcher, batter, wall target, and mobile-safe control zones
Initialize Dolt and add the first schema for teams, players, roster membership, matches, match events, high scores, and interaction prompts
Add a typed data client with fixture fallback and Dolt-backed repository tests where practical
Add core domain types for teams, predefined rosters, players, inning state, outs, score, batter order, match summaries, and high scores
Add docs/dev-setup.md with npm, Gas Town, and Dolt setup commands
Add .gastown/rules.md describing the Phaser/TypeScript architecture, v0 scope, testing expectations, and Dolt-backed data requirements
Add .gitignore with node_modules/, dist/, .DS_Store, .gastown/sandboxes/, .dolt/, and *.log
Add the Phaser game shell, boot flow, placeholder scene, responsive scaling, and a visible canvas smoke test on desktop and phone-sized viewports
Scaffold the Vite, TypeScript, Phaser, and Vitest baseline.
